entries.source: "Explain black holes simply"
entries.value: "Ipaliwanag nang simple ang black holes"

entries.source: "Help me understand photosynthesis"
entries.value: "Tulungan mo akong maunawaan photosynthesis"

entries.source: "Teach me how interest works"
entries.value: "Turuan mo ako kung paano interest works"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Learn Anything on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Isang praktikal gabay sa gamit ang Matutunan ang Anything sa inspir para sa foundations pag-aaral, kasama ang mga prompt, mga loop sa pag-aaral, at mas ligtas AI mga gawi.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Isang mas malakas loop sa pag-aaral

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI na tutor

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Humingi ng isang small una hakbang rather kaysa isang huling sagot.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Magtanong ang AI suriin iyong pangangatwiran, hindi lang resulta.

entries.source: Curious learners, students, parents, and self-taught builders who want a friendly place to start.
entries.value: Mga mausisang mag-aaral, estudyante, magulang, at mga self-taught builder na naghahanap ng isang palakaibigang lugar para magsimula.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish ng pagsusulat ang ideya likod mula sa memory.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: Mga Pundasyon

entries.source: Get examples at your level.
entries.value: Get mga halimbawa at iyong antas.

entries.source: Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: Sa halip na magbigay ng mahabang sagot, tinutulungan ka ng inspir na pumili ng mas simpleng pundasyon, mas malalim na landas, o praktikal na halimbawa.

entries.source: Learn Anything
entries.value: Matuto ng Kahit Ano

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Matutunan ang Anything Kasama ang isang Libre AI tutor ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Curious tungkol sa absolutely anything? Magtanong, explore, at go deeper at iyong pace. Iyong buddy gumagawa mga ideya praktikal, memorable, at madali bumuo sa. Subukan: "Ipaliwanag ang paano ang stock merkado actually works."

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor: practical guide
entries.value: Matutunan ang Anything Kasama ang isang Libre AI tutor: praktikal gabay

entries.source: Leave with a useful next question.
entries.value: Iwan kasama ang isang kapaki-pakinabang susunod tanong.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Mga prompt sa subukan

entries.source: Start the live mode at Learn Anything. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Socratic Instruction. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Magsimula ang live mode at Matutunan ang Anything. Kung ikaw gusto isang neighboring pag-aaral format, subukan Socratic Instruction. Para sa isang mas malawak view ng ang platform, Basahin ano isang AI katuwang sa pag-aaral dapat gawin para sa lahat.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Sabihin sa mode kung ano ang sinusubukan mong matutunan o mabuo.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Na difference shows up sa ang flow. Instead ng isa giant response, ang pinakamahusay mga session lumipat sa pamamagitan ng isang loop: set isang layunin, subukan something, get feedback, repair ang mahina spot, at pumili ang susunod action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Na pokus matters. Isang general chatbot Maaari bang sagot almost anything, pero isang pag-aaral mode gives ang conversation isang shape. Ito nudges ikaw toward ang kind ng thinking, pagsasanay, feedback, o exploration na tumutulong ang ideya stick.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Ito ay ang same gawi behind studying kasama ang AI nang walang cheating yourself: keep ang mag-aaral aktibo. AI ay pinaka kapaki-pakinabang kapag ito gives ikaw feedback sa iyong thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Ito mode ay especially kapaki-pakinabang para sa mga mag-aaral sino gusto sa:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Subukan ang hakbang sa iyong own mga salita.

entries.source: Understand the core idea.
entries.value: Understand ang core ideya.

entries.source: Use Learn Anything when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gamitin Matutunan ang Anything Kapag ikaw gusto isang session na nagsisimula quickly pero pa rin umaangkop sa ikaw. Ang una layunin ay hindi sa tunog impressive. Ang una layunin ay gumawa ang susunod hakbang feel posible.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Saan nakatutulong ang mode na ito

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Saan susunod

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Ikaw Maaari bang also magsimula kasama ang isang magaspang version ng iyong totoo problema. Isang magulo una prompt ay fine. Ang session Maaari bang clarify ang antas, madla, deadline, at estilo once ikaw magsimula.
